ValidationRule.description: 代理店1_評価点合計が40以下の場合、代理店1_機能評価（係数）は必須
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( Agency1_EvaluationPointSum__c <= 40, NOT(ISBLANK( Agency1StoreName__c )), OR( ISPICKVAL( Agency1_Factor_FunctionEvaluationUnder40__c , "40点超の場合選択不要" ), ISBLANK(TEXT( Agency1_Factor_FunctionEvaluationUnder40__c )) ), NOT(Creating__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 代理店1_機能評価（係数）は必須です
